description_long: This is a modern, rectangular cabinet with a wood-textured frame and legs, featuring a smooth, light-colored front panel. The cabinet stands on four angled legs, giving it a mid-century modern aesthetic. The front includes three upper drawers with small square handles and three open cubby compartments below, providing both concealed and open storage. The sides and top display a consistent wood grain pattern, while the front panels are a contrasting light beige or off-white. The overall construction appears sturdy, with clean lines and a minimalist design. This piece would be suitable for use in urban interiors such as lobbies, offices, or residential entryways.
description: A modern wood-textured cabinet with three upper drawers and three open cubby compartments, featuring a minimalist design and angled legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the smooth, light-colored panel with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the wood grain texture and the depth of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear-front view revealing three upper drawers with handles and three open cubby compartments below.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the wood grain texture and depth.
